arts.ttl: Revealed: The release clause that could see Premier League rivals prize Carney Chukwuemeka away from Chelsea - as top sides circle for the talented midfielder ahead of transfer window
arts.sum: Coach Enzo Maresca indicated he expected the 21-year old to ask to leave in search of regular first team football after a frustrating first part to the season making just five appearances.

arts.ttl: Arsenal fight Chelsea and Spurs for left-sided Ben White
arts.sum: Arsenal have enjoyed great success down the right with Ben White in that area of the park, and according to data analytics firm SciSports, there is a strong resemblance in style between the former Brighton star and De Cuyper. Arsenal, meanwhile, lead the chase for the player, yet Arteta will struggle to land him during January because De Cuyper wants to remain with Club Brugge until the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Former Chelsea star Oscar says goodbye to China after eight years and £166m in wages
arts.sum: Oscar is returning to hometown club Sao Paulo following eight years in Shanghai where the former Chelsea star earned £400,000 per week and became the Chinese Super League's biggest foreign star

arts.ttl: Decisions made on January recalls for three loaned-out Chelsea players
arts.sum: Chelsea have reportedly decided that they do not plan to recall Raheem Sterling from his loan spell at Arsenal this January, but two other players could return to Stamford Bridge. arts.sum: Chelsea face Fulham for the 35th time in the Premier League era on Saturday for their third London derby in the month of December. arts.ttl: Arsenal and Chelsea ‘join the hunt’ for Belgian player – PL duo could be set for transfer battle
arts.sum: KRC Genk’s Konstantinos Karetsas has been included in Arsenal and Chelsea’s target list, according to Sport 24. Genk initially signed the 17-year-old for their academy in 2023 and promoted him to their first team earlier this year.
